case_title: IANTORNO, SERGIO vs. NACHT, STUART et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUING TRIAL DATE FILED.
JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO APR-03-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL, ON TRIAL

JUDGE D BALLATI; RPTR S LEE; CLK C CARSWELL JURY TRIAL RESUMES WITH IN LIMINE MOTIONS ON THE RECORD. COURT MAKES RULINGS. ROLL CALL OF PROSP JURORS IS TAKEN. IN CHAMBERS, DEFT WAIVES JURY; PLTF WAIVES JURY. COURT RULES THAT CASE WILL PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL AND DISCHARGES THE JURORS. AFTER DISCUSSIONS AMONG PARTIES & THEIR ATNYS, A SETTLEMENT IS REACHED AND RECITED ON THE RECORD WITH A STIP THAT JUDGMENT MAY BE ENTERED IF TERMS ARE NOT KEPT.
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $78.00 FOR TRANSACTION 6313P1050000 (JURY FEES), PAYABLE TO WARTELLE & WEAVER, WARRANT #00017533, DATED MAY-10-1996

JUDGE D BALLATI; RPTR S LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. ATNY C FRIED PRESENT W PLTF IANTORNO. ATNY J S WEAVER PRESENT W DEFTS NACHT AND GAKUBA. IN LIMINE MOTIONS HEARD OUT OF THE PRESENCE OF ANY PROSPECTIVE JURORS AND WITH BOTH ORAL & DOCMTY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES. ROLL CALL TAKEN AND QUALIFICATION OATH ADMININSTERED. SOME JURORS EXCUSED OR DEFERRED. JURORS ORDERED TO RETURN 10:30AM 4/3/96 AND ATNYS TO RETURN 9:00AM 4/3/96 TO CONTINUE IN LIMINE MOTIONS.
